vulnerability.reference: Absence of client-side validation and performance monitoring for local sparse models in federated health settings
vulnerability.generated: Client-specific validation is absent, preventing detection of overfitted subnetwork predictions on edge devices.

impact.reference: Flawed health predictions cause missed diagnoses or false alarms, harming patient outcomes and eroding trust in digital health tools
impact.generated: Overconfident, incorrect health predictions cause clinical errors, harming patients and eroding trust in AI-assisted diagnostics.

dose_response.reference: Overfitted sparse subnetworks yield overconfident predictions under distribution shift, which in federated health prediction on edge devices without client-side validation leads to flawed diagnoses and eroded trust.
dose_response.generated: Lottery ticket sparsification optimizing GNNs for WL expressivity, through federated health predictors on edge devices, triggers undetected overfitted predictions due to absent client-specific validation, leading to overconfident clinical errors that harm patients and erode diagnostic trust.
